children.text:
Severe Weather Alerts
Issued by the US National Weather Service.

Lightning Alerts
Be notified when lightning strikes within 5 miles. Available only when you are within your station's broadcast area.

KAKE First Alerts
Weather Alerts issued by KAKE First Alert Team

Precipitation Alerts
Be notified when heavy precipitation is detected within 5 miles.

Temperature Display
Display the current temperature for your selected Alert Location in the status bar and notifications drawer.
